headline: Wells Fargo CEO drops 3-word warning on economy
summary: “Reasons to worry.” That is Wells Fargo CEO Charles Scharf’s curt, three-word take on the U.S. economy, despite reiterating the strength of the current macro backdrop. Consumers are still spending, employment numbers remain relatively strong, and wages are growing, meaning businesses are ...
